## Summary

Describe the change and the user or project problem it solves.

## Scope

- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Website design
- [ ] WordPress theme
- [ ] MaxPost Core plugin
- [ ] Desktop application
- [ ] API

## Validation

- [ ] The change follows the relevant specification in `docs/`.
- [ ] No unrelated functionality was added.
- [ ] Links and Markdown were checked.
- [ ] Security and privacy implications were considered.
- [ ] Screenshots are included for visual changes.
- [ ] The changelog was updated when required.

## Notes

List known limitations, follow-up work or migration requirements.
